headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today to drive deep progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before the next bi-weekly review.

Salesforce auth failure (INVALID_LOGIN) and Snowflake empty password — need credentials rotated or env vars updated

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake credentials are empty — all product/adoption metrics are dark. This is a recurring blind spot.
Both active Jira tickets lack due dates — consider setting target dates to create accountability and feed into sprint planning.
No Slack activity in last 16h — unusually quiet; confirm channels are connected and no threads were missed.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact captured today yet — primary opportunity is to restore Salesforce/Snowflake visibility and advance evals UX, which directly supports the Agents big rock and 26.4+ release readiness.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 today will progress the UX that drives evaluator adoption for both low-code and coded paths.

slack_summary: No meetings, no emails, no Slack pings — today is a maker day. Top priorities: (1) drive deep progress on AE-744 (Evals UX for justification & actual-vs-expected results) and (2) draft the no-ground-truth design doc for AE-1079. Also flag: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and metrics — get IT to fix today. Zero meetings on the calendar.
